allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('mcpServers', d.get\('mcp', {}\)\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); mcp=d.get\('mcpServers',{}\); [print\(k, ':', list\(v.keys\(\)\)\) for k,v in mcp.items\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); gh=d['mcpServers']['github']; print\('command:', gh['command']\); print\('args:', gh['args']\); print\('env keys:', list\(gh['env'].keys\(\)\)\); token=gh['env'].get\('GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN',''\); print\('token prefix:', token[:10] + '...' if token else '\(없음\)'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); mcp=d.get\('mcpServers',{}\); gh=mcp.get\('github',{}\); print\('command:', gh.get\('command'\)\); print\('env keys:', list\(gh.get\('env',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); mcp=d.get\('mcpServers',{}\); print\(json.dumps\(list\(mcp.keys\(\)\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); gh=d['mcpServers']['github']; print\('command:', gh.get\('command'\)\); print\('args:', gh.get\('args'\)\); print\('env keys:', list\(gh.get\('env',{}\).keys\(\)\)\); token=gh.get\('env',{}\).get\('GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN',''\); print\('token prefix:', token[:15]+'...' if token else '\(없음\)'\)")
